coexistence_summary: Selector and P3 can coexist safely. Selector chooses DA-SGDF; P3 corrects extremes. Both shadow-only, separate dirs. No overlap in test window (P3 corrections in Feb, selector chose DA for all Feb hours). No operational conflict by design — P3 is shadow-only, never replaces original_pred.
winter_no_go_summary: P2.13 winter no-go confirmed: selector chooses DA_anchor 97%+ in winter, consistent with P2.12 conclusion. Selector is safe but not beneficial in winter.
